5042.issue: [W5042] Package "mustache" is used in source file(s) (update-readme.js) but not found in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.trashschedule/blob/master/package.json). Dependency might be missing.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (main.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.trashschedule/blob/master/io-package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.2" at [package.json](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.trashschedule/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
